component.name: Yaak
component.summary: Offline, Git-friendly API client for REST, GraphQL, gRPC and WebSocket

description.p: This is a community package of Yaak, maintained independently.

Yaak is a fast, privacy-first desktop API client for REST, GraphQL, Server-Sent Events, WebSocket and gRPC, built with Tauri, Rust and React. Data stays local, secrets are encrypted, and projects are stored as Git-friendly plain text.

ul.li: REST, GraphQL, SSE, WebSocket and gRPC support
Local-only data with zero telemetry and encrypted secrets
Environment variables, template functions and request chaining
OAuth 2.0, Bearer, Basic, API Key, AWS, JWT and NTLM authentication
Import from cURL, Postman, Insomnia and OpenAPI

description.p: Some advanced features require a paid Yaak plan; the application is otherwise free and open source under the MIT license.
